title: koniga dasycarpa
side_effects: Koniga dasycarpa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Prolonged use of the plant may also lead to kidney damage, respiratory problems, and increased blood pressure. In rare cases, the improper use of Koniga dasycarpa can cause seizures, tremors, and even liver failure. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
